Acting Drivers ஆக்டிங் டிரைவர்கள் Corporate Travel கார்ப்பரேட் பயணம் Temple Tours கோவில் சுற்றுலா Popular Destinations பிரபலமான இடங்கள்

Perumal Manikumar

PROPRIETOR

Acting Driver Services ஆக்டிங் டிரைவர் சேவைகள்

Acting Driver – Outstation One Way Acting Driver – Outstation ஒரு வழி

Driver takes your personal car from Chennai to any destination outside Chennai (only drop-off, no return). Driver takes your personal car from சென்னை to any destination outside சென்னை (only drop-off, no return).

Tariff & Pricing கட்டணம் & விலை

ComponentRate
Base (first 150 km)₹1,800
Additional Distance₹12/km
Night Halt (if needed)₹500
விவரம்விலை
அடிப்படை (first 150 km)₹1,800
கூடுதல் தூரம்₹12/km
இரவு தங்குதல் (if needed)₹500

What's Included சேர்க்கப்பட்டுள்ளது

  • Professional highway driver
  • Safe long-distance driving
  • Professional highway driver
  • Safe long-distance driving

Not Included சேர்க்கப்படவில்லை

  • Driver food
  • Return travel (if required)
  • Driver food
  • Return travel (if required)

Service Details & Information சேவை விவரங்கள்

Service Overview சேவை கண்ணோட்டம்

Our Outstation One-Way Driver service is perfect when you need to drop your car off at another city or move your vehicle without driving it yourself. Our experienced highway drivers handle the long drive safely, allowing you to travel stress-free or send your car ahead. Our Outstation One-Way Driver service is perfect when you need to drop your car off at another city or move your vehicle without driving it yourself. Our experienced highway drivers handle the long drive safely, allowing you to travel stress-free or send your car ahead.

Availability & Coverage கிடைக்கும் தன்மை

• **Availability:** 24/7 Service • **Night Driving:** Safe night driving guaranteed with experienced drivers. • **Booking:** Please book at least 4-6 hours in advance for outstation trips. • **Availability:** 24/7 Service • **Night Driving:** Safe night driving guaranteed with experienced drivers. • **Booking:** Please book at least 4-6 hours in advance for outstation trips.

Dress Code ஆடை கட்டுப்பாடு

Drivers are equipped for long-distance travel with professional conduct. Drivers are equipped for long-distance travel with professional conduct.

Important Information முக்கிய தகவல்கள்

  • Check tyre pressure and fluid levels before a long highway trip.
  • Ensure the spare tyre and tool kit are in good condition.
  • Fastag should have sufficient balance for toll plazas.
  • Driver's return travel is their responsibility unless specified otherwise.
  • Check tyre pressure and fluid levels before a long highway trip.
  • Ensure the spare tyre and tool kit are in good condition.
  • Fastag should have sufficient balance for toll plazas.
  • Driver's return travel is their responsibility unless specified otherwise.

Frequently Asked Questions அடிக்கடி கேட்கப்படும் கேள்விகள்

Q: What if the trip cancels? What if the trip cancels?

Before dispatch → Free. After dispatch → ₹300 Before dispatch → Free. After dispatch → ₹300

Q: Can I get a return driver separately? Can I get a return driver separately?

Yes, book separately. Yes, book separately.
